articles.title: Deep learning drives autonomous molecular reactions with single-bond selectivity in tetra-brominated porphyrins on Au(111)
articles.summary: the approach extends beyond single-bond events, enabling programmed multi-step sequences including four distinct pathways with high fidelity. the platform provides a generalizable framework for on-surface synthesis, where adaptive agents orchestrate molecular transformations with an level of precision and scalability unattainable by manual approaches.

articles.title: Harnessing Uncertainty: Improvisation as a Model for Rapid Behavioral Expansion
articles.summary: in neuroscience, neural uncertainty is increasingly recognized as a hallmark of cognition and volition. cultivating the models’ inherent indeterminism can disrupt their biased attraction toward users’ expectations, boosting the openendedness of humanmodel interactions and fostering cognitive emancipation.

articles.title: Deep recurrent neural networks for water hammer transient prediction and dynamic protection optimization in long distance pipelines
articles.summary: water hammer phenomena pose significant threats to the operational safety and structural integrity of long-distance water transmission pipeline systems. the intelligent decision framework provides water utilities with an adaptive tool for enhancing pipeline safety, minimizing infrastructure damage risks, and optimizing protection resource allocation in complex hydraulic systems.

articles.title: Multi-objective optimization of hybrid laser cleaning process parameters for carbon deposits based on bayesian-SVR and NSGA-II
articles.summary: hybrid laser cleaning combines continuous-wave (CW) laser preheating with pulsed laser ablation to remove piston crown carbon deposits. conventional tuning cannot simultaneously minimize surface roughness (Sa) and carbon residue rate (RC)

articles.title: AI-driven fault detection and classification in photovoltaic systems using deep learning techniques
articles.summary: PVDefectNet is a deep learning-based fault detector and classifier of the PV systems. the proposed solution uses data augmentation techniques to enhance its resistance to operating in different operating environments.

articles.title: The Development of Selective Attention in Children's Emotion Reasoning
articles.summary: children learn to classify an alien's emotional displays into two categories. categories could be learned via two different strategies: distributing attention across all possible emotionrelated cues or selectively attending to the most predictive cu. selective attention use increased by an average of 5 percentage points per year across this age range, characterized by decreasing strategic variability across development.

articles.title: Utilization of machine learning to identify lower extremity biomechanical predictors of rupture in a validated cadaveric model of ACL injury
articles.summary: study presents a detailed evaluation of machine learning techniques for the prediction of anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injuries. ML models were trained and tested on four datasets: 53-feature (Binary) ACL Rupture Biomechanical and Demographic (ARBD/BARDB)
